title: Hollow Knight
short_description: A challenging 2D action adventure set in a ruined underground kingdom.
long_description: Explore a vast hand drawn world. Battle infected creatures. Unlock movement powers. Discover secrets hidden deep below Dirtmouth.

title: Hades
short_description: Fight out of the Underworld in a fast paced rogue like dungeon crawler.
long_description: Play as Zagreus and battle through ever changing chambers. Build powerful boons. Meet the gods of Olympus and challenge the lord of the dead.
platforms: PC; Nintendo Switch; PlayStation; Xbox; iOS

title: Celeste
short_description: A precision platformer about climbing a mountain and facing your inner demons.
long_description: Help Madeline climb Celeste Mountain through handcrafted platforming challenges. Find hidden strawberries. Learn a moving story about resilience and self discovery.
tags: Precision Platformer; Story Rich; Single Player

title: Dead Cells
short_description: A roguevania action platformer with brutal combat and constant experimentation.
long_description: Fight through a changing castle in fast 2D combat. Mix weapons and abilities. Learn from every death and push deeper on each run.
platforms: PC; Nintendo Switch; PlayStation; Xbox; iOS; Android

title: Stardew Valley
short_description: Build a farm and a new life in a beloved country life RPG.
long_description: Restore your grandfather's farm. Grow crops. Raise animals. Befriend Pelican Town. Explore mines and relax in a cozy world at your own pace.
platforms: PC; Nintendo Switch; PlayStation; Xbox; iOS; Android

title: Terraria
short_description: Dig fight build and explore in a giant sandbox adventure.
long_description: Shape the world around you. Craft gear. Fight bosses. Build bases. Terraria blends exploration survival and combat in a massive 2D sandbox.
platforms: PC; Nintendo Switch; PlayStation; Xbox; iOS; Android

title: Slay the Spire
short_description: A deckbuilding roguelike where every climb creates a new strategy.
long_description: Build a unique deck. Collect relics. Discover powerful combos. Slay the Spire mixes card game strategy with roguelike progression.
platforms: PC; Nintendo Switch; PlayStation; Xbox; iOS; Android

title: Cuphead
short_description: A classic run and gun action game inspired by 1930s animation.
long_description: Take on inventive boss battles in a beautiful hand inked world. Play solo or co-op and master precise shooting and dodging.

title: Undertale
short_description: A memorable RPG where choices and mercy matter.
long_description: Fall into the Underground and meet a cast of strange monsters. Fight or spare enemies. Shape the story with every decision you make.
tags: Story Rich; Pixel Art; Choices Matter

title: Risk of Rain 2
short_description: Survive an alien planet in a chaotic co-op roguelike shooter.
long_description: Fight through swarms of enemies. Stack items into wild builds. Play solo or with friends and escape a hostile world.

title: Valheim
short_description: A Viking survival sandbox with exploration crafting and boss battles.
long_description: Build longhouses. Sail dangerous seas. Gather resources and challenge mythic creatures in a huge procedurally generated world.

title: RimWorld
short_description: A colony sim and story generator full of hard choices and emergent chaos.
long_description: Manage colonists on a distant world. Build a base. Survive raids weather and disasters. Every colony becomes a different story.

title: Factorio
short_description: Build automated factories and optimize everything.
long_description: Mine resources. Design production lines. Defend your base. Factorio turns logistics and automation into a deeply satisfying strategy game.

title: Baldur's Gate 3
short_description: A massive party based RPG set in the world of Dungeons and Dragons.
long_description: Create a hero. Gather companions. Make difficult choices and shape a cinematic fantasy adventure with tactical combat and deep roleplaying.
tags: Party Based; Story Rich; Turn Based

title: Divinity: Original Sin 2
short_description: A rich tactical RPG with reactive quests and deep co-op.
long_description: Choose your origin. Explore Rivellon. Build creative combat combos and solve quests in multiple ways in one of the best modern CRPGs.
platforms: PC; Nintendo Switch; PlayStation; Xbox; Mac

title: Darkest Dungeon
short_description: A grim turn based dungeon crawler about stress and survival.
long_description: Recruit a roster of flawed heroes. Venture into cursed ruins. Manage stress disease and death in a brutally atmospheric gothic campaign.
platforms: PC; Nintendo Switch; PlayStation; Xbox; iOS

title: Vampire Survivors
short_description: Survive waves of monsters in a wildly addictive action roguelite.
long_description: Move through huge enemy swarms. Choose upgrades every level. Break the screen with absurd builds in short highly replayable runs.
platforms: PC; Nintendo Switch; PlayStation; Xbox; iOS; Android

title: Enter the Gungeon
short_description: A fast top down bullet hell dungeon crawler packed with guns and secrets.
long_description: Dodge roll through dangerous rooms. Collect bizarre weapons. Fight inventive bosses and search the Gungeon for the gun that can kill the past.
tags: Bullet Hell; Co-op; Twin Stick Shooter

title: Spiritfarer
short_description: A cozy management game about guiding spirits to the afterlife.
long_description: Build a ferry. Care for your spirit friends. Farm cook fish and craft your way across a beautiful emotional journey.

title: A Short Hike
short_description: A relaxing exploration game about hiking to a mountain summit.
long_description: Wander through a peaceful park. Meet other hikers. Glide fish and discover secrets in a short warm adventure.
